title: Shipping: At the centre of global trade
section_path: Shipping: At the centre of global trade
section_path_text: Shipping: At the centre of global trade
summary:
Main
Globalization will stutter but hopefully not reverse and a global recession avoided. Shipping will ride this wave and hopefully come out stronger in the process. By Michalis Voutsinas
Trump followed through with his tarrif bonanza this week making good his pre-election vow to attempt redress trade flows and boost America's industrial and manufacturing base.
